title: Draft agenda for the 66th Board of Regulators (BoR) plenary meeting, Virtual, 12 March 2026
text:
BoR (26) 27
Draft Agenda
for the 66th Board of Regulators (BoR) Virtual Meeting in 2026
12 March 2026 (Thursday)
1 Opening of the meeting and adoption of the agenda
Document(s) BoR (26) 27 Draft BEREC BoR Agenda
Introduction by BEREC Chair (AKOS)
Action requested To agree on the agenda and identify any points to be raised under “Any
other business” (AOB).
2 List of “A” items
Document(s) BoR (26) 28 Draft 32nd BEREC International Roaming Benchmark Data
Report
BoR (26) 29 Draft BEREC Summary Report on BEREC-BEUC joint
workshop on end-user rights
BoR (26) 30 Draft BEREC Internal report - Analysis of the results of the
BEREC-NIS Cooperation Group Operator Survey on the Supplier
Landscape
Introduction by BEREC Chair (AKOS)
Action requested To approve the documents included in the ‘A’ item list.
3 Information from the BEREC Chair
Document(s) BoR (26) 31 Division of tasks within the Mini Board
Introduction by BEREC Chair (AKOS)
Action requested To take note of the information.
4 Information from the BEREC Office
Document(s) BoR (26) 32 Contact lists pack
BoR (26) 33 Information on the planned electronic voting procedures
BoR (26) 34 Information on the electronic voting procedures since the last
plenary meeting
BoR (26) 35 Work Programme 2026 status update
Introduction by BEREC Office Representative
Action requested To take note of the information.
Agenda of the 66th Ordinary meeting of the Board of Regulators, 12 March 2026

5 Information from the European Commission including update on the DNA
Document(s) No document
Introduction by European Commission Representative
Action requested To take note of the information.
6 Market and Economic Analysis (MEA)
Document(s) BoR (26) 36 Draft BEREC Fact finding report on connectivity, competition
and regulatory highlights in different jurisdictions
Introduction by MEA WG Co-Chairs (ANCOM/CNMC)
Action requested To approve for public consultation.
7 Roaming (ROAM)
Document(s) BoR (26) 37 Draft BEREC Retail Roaming Guidelines
BoR (26) 38 Draft BEREC Wholesale Roaming Guidelines
Introduction by ROAM WG Co-Chairs (RTR/EETT)
Action requested To approve for public consultation.
8 Planning and Future Trends (PFT)
8.1 Draft BEREC Report on Virtual Worlds and Web 4.0
Document(s)
BoR (26) 39 Draft BEREC Report on Virtual Worlds and Web 4.0
Introduction by PFT WG Co-Chairs (CNMC/AGCOM)
Action requested To approve for public consultation.
8.2 Oral update on draft BEREC Work Programme 2027
Document(s)
No document
Introduction by Incoming BEREC Chair (CNMC)
Action requested To take note of the information.
8.3 BEREC International Cooperation
Document(s)
BoR (26) 40 Draft BEREC Calendar of international meetings and events
in 2026
Introduction by BEREC Vice-Chair responsible for international activities (ComReg)
Action requested To take note of the information and approve for publication.
2

9 Oral update on the 14th BEREC Stakeholder Forum
Document(s) No document
Introduction by Incoming BEREC Chair (CNMC)
Action requested To take note of the information.
10 AOB
Information on the 67th BoR plenary meeting (2 June 2026, Dublin, Ireland)
Document(s) No document
Introduction by Representative of the host NRA (ComReg)
Action requested To take note of the information.
11 Regulatory Framework (RF)
Document(s) BoR (26) 41 Draft High-Level BEREC Assessment of the main areas of
intervention of the Digital Networks Act
Introduction by RF WG Co-Chairs (AGCOM/NMHH)
Action requested To take note of the information and decide on the way forward.
3
author: BEREC
